message:
🐛 Replace silent .catch(() => {}) with logged warnings in AlertsContext, EnterpriseComplianceCards, prefetchCardData (#10930)

Replace empty .catch(() => {}) handlers that silently swallow errors with
console.warn() calls that log descriptive context. This makes debugging
failed notifications, compliance API fetches, and prefetch operations
possible instead of having errors disappear silently.

Files changed:
- AlertsContext.tsx: 2 notification send failures now logged
- EnterpriseComplianceCards.tsx: 16 API fetch failures now logged
- prefetchCardData.ts: 4 prefetch queue failures now logged

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
